images.prompt: A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a stunning Japanese idol‑style model, early twenties, with flawless yet realistic skin (visible pores, faint vellus hair), large expressive eyes, and a confident smirk. She stands beneath a cascade of cherry blossoms at dusk, the neon sign glow from a nearby street lamp rendering the scene bright and clear, bathed in a monochrome red color grade. The model wears a sleek, form‑fitting matching tracksuit – the zip half‑down revealing a hint of silky lace top underneath – its matte navy fabric hugging her slim waist and ample chest. Wet, straight black hair clings to her neck, a single droplet gleaming on her collarbone. She interacts with the camera as a fan‑inspired confidante, the bokeh of distant city lights and falling petals softening the background. Shot on Sony A7R IV with an 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, shallow depth of field, global illumination, ray‑traced lighting, and studio‑style neon accents.8k photo, Large breasts
